response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C++ at National Instruments, but lacks recent C++ work (last significant C++ role was in 2015). His expertise leans heavily toward web/mobile development (Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript) and newer languages (D, Swift), with limited evidence of secure development lifecycle practices or industrial automation/cybersecurity exposure. His strengths in full-stack development and architecture are notable, but the mismatch with the role's core requirements (C++, STL, secure industrial systems) raises concerns.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks (Node.js, TypeScript, React, D, Swift)
Proven track record in architecture, system design, and performance optimization (e.g., low-latency apps, micro-services)
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming) and mentorship (workshops, teaching)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant role in 2015) and no demonstrated use of STL or object-oriented C++ patterns
No clear evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) implementation or IEC 62443 compliance experience
Lacks domain expertise in industrial automation, IoT, or cybersecurity for manufacturing environments

key_factors.factor: Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 compliance
